feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Supply Chain Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Supply Chain Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP B1 Incoterms fields not passed from Purchase to Goods Receipt
entry.content:
In SAP Business One, when creating Goods Receipt PO related to a Purchase Order, using DIAPI or Service Layer, the fields related to Incoterms (Incoterm, Country, Region, etc) are not copied to the destination document. But the same process, when executed directly in SAP, copy this fields. 
  Is there any configuration that we can do, so the fields are copied?

entry.title: Yard Logistics: Error while creating new business partner driver (number is not in number range)
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

next attempt, hopefully now in the right area...

I managed to customize Yard Logistics successfully (YO, YT etc.). Everything is working out well - except the creation of a new driver. So the self check-in is working until the system tries to create the driver id and driver. Than I get an error message, that the number is not in the number range. 

The driver in Yard Logistics is a business partner and has an own number range which is customized in 

"SPRO > Yard Logistics > Master Data > Setting Up the Yard > Define Number Ranges for Yard Request, Yard Order, Yard Task > Define Number Ranges for Driver Business Partner". 

Unfortunately it seems, that the system tries to use the "normal number range" which is defined in the "Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner". 

Can someone explain to me how the concept of Business Partners/ Business Partner Role and number range is functioning? How does the system know which business partner role uses which number range? I can't find the point where i can connect the business partner role to the number range which I defined in YL.

 

Configuration:

  • SAP Business Partner
    • Both connected via Standard Assignment BP  Role > BP Role Cat.
    • Number Range used? Don't know, can't find the connection, seems that number range "01" is used, but dont know why
    • Business Partner Role: ZYL_DR
    • Business Partner Role Category: ZYL_DR
  • Yard Logistics
    • Number range for business partner driver is defined
    • Default business partner for driver: ZYL_DR

If you need further information, please let me know. 

Many thanks, 

Sandra

entry.title: Flagging Materials in SAP for New Customs Certificate Requirements
entry.content:
Hi,

The user reports that new customs regulations require certificates to be included with shipments. They have prepared an Excel sheet listing the materials and their corresponding HTS (Harmonized Tariff Schedule) codes that fall under the new requirements. They want these materials to be marked in SAP (e.g., with a flag, status, or another method) to ensure that the complete documentation is included with each shipment.

Do you have guys any idea?

Thank you in advance for any help!

BR

entry.title: Yard Logistics: Self Check-In: Empty Error Message when SAP GUI/Launchpad is set to Language "DE"
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

I have an issue with the Self Check-In App in Yard Logistics.

Two different system behaviours:

  • SAP GUI/Fiori Login Language: EN (English)
    • Open Self-Check-In App
    • Choose Language German or English in Self Check-In App
    • Self-Check-In works without Error message

 

  • SAP GUI/Fiori Login Language: DE (German)
    • Open Self-Check-In App
    • Choose Language German or English in Self Check-In App
    • Type in Number of Yard Order
    • Go to Next Step
    • Register New Driver
    • Type in Forename and Surname of Driver 
    • Go to Next Step
    • Enjoy this Error Message: 

My guess is, that somewhere a translation or customizing regarding the german language is missing. But I couldn't find anything. Another guess is, that it could be a system setting, because the system language is the problem not the language in the app itself. 

Any ideas for a solution? Or any ideas where I could check settings?

Many greetings, 

Sandra

entry.title: Handling Unit Has Multiple Materials associated and one packing list for all materials in the HU
entry.content:
All Material/Product are issued in one Handling Unit where user has an option during label printing to say how many items? In my case 3 so the labels get 1/3, 2/3, 3/3 then one packing list

But this way is inefficient specially with respect to tracking the shipment because the warehouse also supports the Transportation department where the pickup and delivery are tracked for all goods shipped between plants/contractors . With multiple units having the same Handling Unit ( tracking Number ) often times transportation is splitting the shipment so there can be 2 Products delivered and one product still at our location which is not accurate tracking.

Also how can i change the Packing slip and Shipping label. The packing list should include the SAP document number added ( Barcode and human readable) to be used by filed location to receive all items with their mobile solution, and with breakdown having all individual HU’s and corresponding materials. The packing list should include separate HU’s showing their own picked quantity as 1 along with Item Id.

 

Thank you for the help.

entry.title: How to Update Material Status on Sales Org 2 Tab in ECC
entry.content:
Dear Sir or Madam,

Could you kindly specify the transaction code in ECC that is necessary to deactivate a sales organization for a specific SKU as shown in the provided screenshot? To move it from AC to OB.

entry.title: Career Roadmap for a Fresher in SCM & Logistics – Need Guidance
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am transitioning into the Supply Chain Management (SCM) and Logistics domain and am eager to build a strong foundation. Since I am a fresher in this field, I would appreciate your guidance on the key concepts, tools, and SAP modules I should focus on to kickstart my career.

Some specific questions I have:

  1. What are the essential SAP modules for SCM & Logistics that I should start learning?

  2. Are there any recommended learning paths, certifications, or free resources for beginners?

  3. What practical skills or industry knowledge should I develop to improve my job prospects?

  4. Any advice on how to gain hands-on experience as a fresher in this domain?

I would be grateful for any insights, roadmaps, or advice from experienced professionals in this community. Looking forward to your suggestions.

Thanks in advance!
Lewis Arun

entry.title: Bin capcity error for fixed bins product
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In a Public cloud, We are having 2-fixed bins assignment concept for a product.

Requiremnt is- For a product-ABC, has two fixed bins XXX (Bin capacity - 25 EA ), YYY (Bin capacity - 15 EA). For the first bin 20 EA stock is filled, When we are trying to create new warehouse task for 15EA for the same product we are getting error as " no Putaway- max storage type qty exceeded".

Kindly, suggest what are configs iam missing in the storage type which i configured.

Pls find the below screenshots for your reference.

 

Kindly do the needful.

Thanks,
Saikumar

entry.title: Auto Warehouse task creation after Goods receipt is done in putaway
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In Public cloud,

Kindly provide the process, How the warehouse task should create automatically after the Goods receipt is done as per the putaway Rules ( Fixed bins- Bin Capcity) .

Thanks,
Saikumar

entry.title: What configurations/enhancements in SAP EWM we can implement to prioritize warehouse task creation?
entry.content:
Hello SAP EWM Community,

We’re looking to optimize the creation and prioritization of warehouse tasks for high-demand items in our distribution center managed by SAP EWM. Specifically, we aim to reduce the picking time and improve order fulfillment rates for these items.

Key Points:

  1. Our warehouse handles a mix of high- and low-demand items.
  2. Current picking strategies do not adequately prioritize high-demand items, leading to delays.
  3. We utilize standard picking and putaway strategies configured in SAP EWM.

Specific Question:

What configurations or enhancements in SAP EWM can be implemented to prioritize warehouse task creation for high-demand items, ensuring faster picking and improved order fulfillment?

Looking forward to your insights and recommendations!

Best regards

entry.title: how to send Quality Notification to supplier Via email in S4hana public cloud by using OPD setup
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

business have requirement to send Q notification to supplier via email by using OPD setup, Email Recipients should pick from supplier master data, instead of default email address. For example, it could be read from a master data address or from a document address. Output Control should use this email address always as TO address. how i can achieve this in S4hana public cloud. your help will really appreciated. 

 

Thanks,

Kalidas

entry.title: Keep handling unit from outbound to inbound
entry.content:
Hi,

Plant 1: is doing good issue/outbound delivery and packing the goods in Handling Units

Plant 2: Is receiving the goods/inbound delivery from Plant 1 and doing goods receipt.

Issue/question: When plant 2 is doing goods receipt we want to keep the Handling Unit from Plant 1. How do we keep the exact same number from Plant 1?

Thanks

entry.title: Hi , i am looking to run a report for what part numbers are in SLOC in my storage location
entry.content:
Apologies ,brand new to this , I'm looking to run an Sloc report for part numbers specifically in my storage location of which there are many parts.

I can get information from MMBE but I can only seem to do that one number at a time.I want to run a report that just shows me what in the Sloc area.

Thank you

entry.title: SCM and LiveCache System SWPM Export
entry.content:
Dear Team,

The SCM system (QSC) is currently running on an MSSQL Server database, while the LiveCache system (QLC) is running on a MAXDB database. As per the customer's request, we are required to perform an SWPM export of the SCM system.

I would like to clarify the following:

When executing the SWPM export of the SCM system (hosted on MSSQL Server), will the LiveCache data also be included in this export? In other words, is exporting and importing the SCM database alone sufficient?

Or,

Do I need to perform a separate export of the LiveCache system using SWPM after completing the SCM export?

if so, could you please advise on the appropriate method for exporting LiveCache — should it be done via SWPM or through another tool?

Please advise me on this.

Regards,
Appuru

entry.title: STO PO creation through BAPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

           I'm creating STO PO through BAPI_PO_CREATE1, while executing this I'm facing ME 083 Enter supplier error. I have maintained correct document type, suppling plant and other details whatever we maintain during manual creation of STO PO. Can you suggest any solution?

entry.title: Handling LiveCache in a heterogeneous migration scenario
entry.content:
Hello All,

As part of the heterogeneous migration process, we are required to export both the SCM instance and the liveCache.

Requesting your guidance on executing the report /SAPAPO/OM_LC_DOWNLOAD_UPLOAD in the production client, along with the detailed steps involved.

Additionally, please provide the prerequisite checks that need to be carried out prior to the SCM system (both scm and livecache) migration to HANA.

Source details
SCM Version:
SAP SCM 7.0 - 21 (01/2019) - SAP SCM 7.0
EHP2 FOR SAP SCM 7.0 - EHP2 FOR SAP SCM 7.0 - 23 (02/2019) - EHP2 FOR SAP SCM 7.0
SAP NETWEAVER - SAP EHP3 FOR 7.0 - 24 (01/2019)- SAP EHP3 FOR SAP NETWEAVER 7.0

SQL DB: Microsoft SQL Server 2017
MAXDB database :7.9.10.07
OS: Windows Server 2019

Note:
The operating system is changing from Windows to Linux.
Only the SCM database will be changed in the target system i.e ( from sql server to  HANA db).
LiveCache will continue to use the same database (MaxDB) in the target environment.

Regards
Appuru

entry.title: I have all correct entry maintained in MM50 but still the same message as no materials selected
entry.content: While I am trying to extend the material master view using the MM50 , I am adding all the materials correct plant correct Material type all is okay still its giving message as no materials selected

entry.title: How to provide masking option for badge number entry in SAP DM POD?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have come across the requirement where in Badge number entry should be masked with special character like * or #. As part of standard OOTB configuration we don't see any option. Could you please suggest any other option?

Regard's

Uday.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Stock Room Management - Fiori Applications compatibility
entry.content:
Good day, 

I am not able to find relevant SAP information on a list of Fiori Apps that remain compatible from LE-WM move to Stock room Management on S/4HANA.

Are there any reference documents or KBA that may list any known issues and workarounds? 

 

Regards

Pat

entry.title: WBS element is not getting updated in the AUFK table Sales order gets updated
entry.content:
Hi Guys do you know why WBS element is not getting updated in the AUFK table Sales order gets updated , so if account assignment is Sales order then it gets updated in AUFK but if the account assignment is WBS element it is not showing in AUFK table , do you know if any configuration we need to do .

For other order type eg PS04  we can see the element WBS in AUFK
